programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including multiple Emmy, Peabody and Edward R. Murrow Awards.

programme.title: What Would You Do?
programme.desc: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

programme.title: The Fifth Estate
programme.desc: The top-notch team of hosts Bob McKeown, Gillian Findlay, Mark Kelley and Habiba Nosheen provides unique and engaging documentaries from Canada and beyond. "The Fifth Estate" is a reference to the term Fourth Estate, and was chosen to highlight the program's determination to go beyond everyday news into original journalism. The series has won numerous awards for its reporting, including Gemini Awards, International Emmys, the Michener Award, and even an Academy Award for a 1981 episode that was released in theaters the following year. Since September 1975, Canadians have tuned in to experience interesting stories that are always well-crafted and thought-provoking.

programme.desc: In this comedic crime drama, aspiring boxer Bobby (Jon Favreau) and pal Ricky (Vince Vaughn) head to New York as representatives of Los Angeles mob boss Max (Peter Falk). Things aren't going well with Bobby's job, his boxing dreams or his girlfriend (Famke Janssen), and he hopes that helping out Max will fix it. But trouble hits when the two meet up with Ruiz (Sean Combs) and the gangsters of New York.

programme.desc: A former DEA agent (Jason Statham) returns to action to save his daughter and his new town from a drug-dealing sociopath (James Franco).

programme.title: Love at First Like
programme.desc: A journalist who is out of her depth in the social media world is partnered with the leading dating advice influencer on a profile. Can they move past their clashes and open up their hearts?

programme.title: Good Luck Chuck
programme.desc: After meeting the woman (Jessica Alba) of his dreams, a dentist (Dane Cook) must find a way to break a curse that causes each of his ex-lovers to find true love with her next boyfriend.

programme.title: The Groomsmen
programme.desc: A groom (Ed Burns) and his four attendants wrestle with issues related to friendship and maturity a week before the big day.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Good Deeds
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman breaks free from expectations after meeting a struggling single mother

programme.title: Breathing Lessons
programme.desc: Hallmark Hall of Fame. A mature couple get lost on a trip that becomes a crazy adventure.

programme.title: An Uncommon Grace
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Grace hopes that moving to a farm will help her forget the ravages of war.

programme.title: For Better or For Worse
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A successful wedding planner butts heads with a charming divorce lawyer.

programme.title: Love at Sea
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Olivia gets a great opportunity to organize an event on a luxury cruise.

programme.title: Devil on Campus: The Larry Ray Story
programme.desc: When con man Larry Ray moves into his daughter's dorm, he enthralls her friends while preying on their insecurities and fears. As the students get pulled deeper into his web of deceit, Ray's manipulation further alienates them from their families.

programme.title: Doomsday Mom: The Lori Vallow Story
programme.desc: Suspicion falls on Lori Vallow and her husband, Chad Daybell, when their two young children disappear from their Idaho home in 2019.

programme.title: Husband, Father, Killer: The Alyssa Pladl Story
programme.desc: As a teen, Alyssa has a relationship with abusive Steven, but their path takes a dark turn after she has his child and gives her up for adoption. Years later, their daughter seeks them out, and Steven manipulates her into an affair.

programme.title: My Life Is a Lifetime Movie: Husbands Gone Wrong
programme.desc: A woman's life is turned upside down when her husband is accused of stealing body parts a woman marries a man she met online after a whirlwind courtship.

programme.title: Devil on Campus: The Larry Ray Story
programme.desc: When con man Larry Ray moves into his daughter's dorm, he enthralls her friends while preying on their insecurities and fears. As the students get pulled deeper into his web of deceit, Ray's manipulation further alienates them from their families.

programme.title: Dirty Grandpa
programme.desc: Uptight lawyer Jason Kelly is one week away from marrying his boss's controlling daughter, putting him on the fast track for a partnership at his firm. Tricked by his grandfather Dick, Jason finds himself driving the foulmouthed old man to Daytona Beach, Fla., for a wild spring break that includes frat parties, bar fights and a night of karaoke. While Jason worries about the upcoming wedding, Dick tries to show his grandson how to live life to the fullest.

programme.title: Friends With Kids
programme.desc: In the wake of their friends' marriages and eventual offspring, longtime pals Julie (Jennifer Westfeldt) and Jason (Adam Scott) decide to have a child together without becoming a couple. By becoming "time-share" parents, they reason, they can experience the joys of parenthood without significantly curbing their personal freedom. However, when Julie and Jason both become involved with others, they discover that they secretly harbor romantic feelings for each other.

programme.title: How to Be a Latin Lover
programme.desc: Maximo gets the surprise of his life when his wealthy, 80-year-old wife dumps him for a younger car salesman. Forced out of his mansion, he must now move in with his estranged sister Sara and her nerdy but adorable son Hugo. Anxious to return to the lap of luxury, Maximo hatches a scheme to seduce a widowed billionaire and live the high life once again.

programme.title: Madea's Family Reunion
programme.desc: Southern matriarch Madea (Tyler Perry) has a lot on her plate. Her nieces have relationship troubles, and Madea has just been ordered by the court to become the guardian of a rebellious teenager named Nikki. Madea must keep the peace and keep her family together while simultaneously planning her clan's reunion.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: Nearly twenty years after the cult TV show Galaxy Quest was cancelled, the alumni cast is asked for help by an alien species in order to save the universe.

programme.title: Alex Rider: Operation Stormbreaker
programme.desc: After his uncle dies, a young boy learns of his relative's true occupation as an undercover spy and is later recruited to be undercover himself. Based on the novel by Anthony Horowitz.

programme.title: DOA: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The world's best fighters are invited to DOA, a martial-arts tournament. Four female rival fighters, an aristocratic warrior, a wrestling superstar, an athlete with a tragic past, and an assassin-for-hire, work together to uncover a secret.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: Nearly twenty years after the cult TV show Galaxy Quest was cancelled, the alumni cast is asked for help by an alien species in order to save the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: After an epic battle, a great city lies in ruins, but the Earth itself is saved. As humanity begins to pick up the pieces, a shadowy group emerges to try to take control of history. Meanwhile, an ancient and powerful new menace sets its sights on Earth. A new group of humans, led by Cade Yeager (Mark Wahlberg), helps Optimus Prime (Peter Cullen) and the Autobots rise up to meet their most fearsome challenge yet: a worldwide war of good versus evil.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: In this sequel set eleven years after "The Terminator," young John Connor (Edward Furlong), the key to civilization's victory over a future robot uprising, is the target of the shape-shifting T-1000 (Robert Patrick), a Terminator sent from the future to kill him. Another Terminator, the revamped T-800 (Arnold Schwarzenegger), has been sent back to protect the boy. As John and his mother (Linda Hamilton) go on the run with the T-800, the boy forms an unexpected bond with the robot.

programme.title: Terminator Genisys
programme.desc: When John Connor (Jason Clarke), leader of the human resistance against Skynet, sends Kyle Reese (Jai Courtney) back to 1984 to protect his mother, Sarah (Emilia Clarke), from a Terminator assassin, an unexpected turn of events creates an altered timeline. Instead of a scared waitress, Sarah is a skilled fighter and has a Terminator guardian (Arnold Schwarzenegger) by her side. Faced with unlikely allies and dangerous new enemies, Reese sets out on an unexpected new mission: reset the future.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: An ancient struggle between two Cybertronian races, the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons, comes to Earth, with a clue to the ultimate power held by a teenager.

programme.title: Running With Scissors
programme.desc: As the son of an alcoholic father (Alec Baldwin) and a mentally ill mother (Annette Bening), young Augusten Burroughs (Joseph Cross) faces a challenging childhood at the very least. His life takes an unexpected turn when his mother gives him to her unorthodox therapist (Brian Cox), and the boy becomes a member of the doctor's own strange, extended family.

programme.title: My Mom's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: After several years away, FBI agent Henry Durand (Colin Hanks) returns to find his mother, Marty (Meg Ryan), a much different person: Having long mourned for Henry's father, she is now embracing single life. One day, while Marty, Henry and his new fiancée, Emily (Selma Blair), are out for a walk, they meet Tommy (Antonio Banderas), a mysterious stranger, with whom Marty then becomes involved. However, through his FBI contacts, Henry learns that Tommy is suspected of being an art thief.

programme.title: Rent
programme.desc: In this musical, set at the dawn of the 1990s, a group of New Yorkers struggle with their careers, love lives and the effects of the AIDS epidemic on their community. Mark (Anthony Rapp), an aspiring filmmaker, and Roger (Adam Pascal), an HIV-positive musician, scramble for money to pay rent to their landlord and former roommate, Benny (Taye Diggs). Meanwhile, their friend Tom (Jesse L. Martin), a professor, has fallen for Angel (Wilson Jermaine Heredia), who is slowly dying of AIDS.

programme.title: The Cave
programme.desc: Deadly monsters hunt members (Cole Hauser, Morris Chestnut, Eddie Cibrian) of an exploration team within a vast network of caverns beneath the Carpathian Mountains.

programme.title: It Happened to Jane
programme.desc: After a shipment of fresh lobsters isn't delivered on time to Jane Osgood (Doris Day), a widowed mother of two running a failing restaurant supply business in Maine, she hires her lawyer friend George Denham (Jack Lemmon) to sue the railroad company she believes is responsible for the damages. The court case generates lots of publicity and Osgood is famous. A charismatic news reporter (Steve Forrest) takes to Osgood, but that doesn't sit well with Denham, who also has eyes for her.

programme.title: Harriet Craig
programme.desc: Harriet Craig (Joan Crawford) enjoys the married life but constantly tries to control those around her. She does not trust her husband, Walter (Wendell Corey), without checking up on him. When he is offered a promotion that will require traveling, Harriet tells his boss that Walter has a gambling problem. She also sabotages a budding relationship between her cousin Clare and Wes Miller, Walter's assistant. However, Walter discovers Harriet's interference, which leads to a confrontation.

programme.title: Don't Raise the Bridge, Lower the River
programme.desc: Dreamer George Lester (Jerry Lewis) continually focuses on outrageous ways to make cash, and his fed-up wife, Pamela (Jacqueline Pearce), finally decides to leave him. To impress her, he converts their home into a swinging dance club -- but she is mortified when she returns. Undeterred, George enlists his grifter buddy H. William Homer (Terry-Thomas) and concocts a bizarre moneymaking plan that involves secret blueprints, international espionage and crooked dentist Dr. Pinto (John Bluthal).

programme.title: The Caine Mutiny
programme.desc: During World War II, a dilapidated vessel, the Caine, gets a new ensign, Willis Keith (Robert Francis), and a new captain, Commander Queeg (Humphrey Bogart). The crew sees Queeg's unconventional behavior as irrational, and communications officer Thomas Keefer (Fred MacMurray) spreads suspicion about his suitability as captain. When a dire situation during a storm forces the executive officer (Van Johnson) to relieve Queeg of his duties, he and Ensign Keith are tried for mutiny.

programme.title: Domestic Disturbance
programme.desc: In this “edge of your seat thriller,”* John Travolta stars as Frank Morrison, a man who discovers that his son's new stepfather (Vince Vaughn) is not who he pretends to be.

programme.title: The Phantom
programme.desc: The story begins as an expedition lands on the island of Bengalla, seeking the skulls of Touganda. Believed to harness an energy force of power, they could spell disaster for mankind.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: Tom Cruise is superb as Maverick Mitchell, a young flyer who's out to become the best. And Kelly McGillis plays the instructor who teaches Maverick a few things you can't learn in a classroom.

programme.title: Days of Thunder
programme.desc: Discovered by businessman Tim Daland, Cole is teamed with legendary crew chief and car-builder Harry Hogge to race for the Winston Cup at the Daytona 500. A crash nearly ends Cole's career and he must turn to a beautiful doctor to regain his nerve.

programme.title: Gray Lady Down
programme.desc: A Navy captain (David Carradine) uses his experimental Snark to reach a nuclear submarine stuck on an ocean ledge.

programme.title: The Prisoner of Zenda
programme.desc: A plotting duke has a look-alike commoner (Peter Sellers) pose as Rudolf V, the next king of Ruritania.

programme.title: More American Graffiti
programme.desc: This sequel to the nostalgic film by George Lucas revisits characters from the earlier movie, most notably nice guy Steve Bolander (Ron Howard), who has gone on to marry his sweetheart, Laurie (Cindy Williams). Also featured is car enthusiast John Milner (Paul Le Mat), who has moved into a career on the drag-racing circuit. As the characters deal with personal matters, major social issues such as the Vietnam War and the peace movement also factor into their lives.

programme.title: The Front Page
programme.desc: Successful Chicago newspaper reporter Hildy Johnson (Jack Lemmon) is hanging up his journalist's hat to marry Peggy Grant (Susan Sarandon). When his editor, the arrogant, self-important Walter Burns (Walter Matthau), learns of Hildy's plans, he goes to great lengths to keep his star writer. They learn that the notorious (but possibly wrongfully accused) criminal, Earl Williams (Austin Pendleton), has escaped on the eve of his execution, and Hildy can't resist this one last sensational story.

programme.title: I'm Not Here
programme.desc: A man struggles with the tragic memories of his past as he tries to make sense of the present, but soon realizes that time isn't the enemy he thinks it is.

programme.title: Murder Bury Win
programme.desc: Three friends have created a board game, MURDER BURY WIN, and they think it has what it takes to become a bestseller on the indie charts. When their attempt to crowdfund fails, a mysterious man makes them an offer: he will publish their game on the condition that he takes credit as the sole creator and owner.

programme.title: DC Noir
programme.desc: DC Noir: an anthology feature film based on the short stories of George Pelecanos, lauded novelist & writer/producer of HBO's The Wire and The Deuce.

programme.title: Rock Camp
programme.desc: Rock and roll disciples from all walks of life get the once-in-a-lifetime chance to jam with their heroes at Rock 'N Roll Fantasy Camp. Follow four campers and 30+ legendary musicians as they bond over their shared passion for music.

programme.title: Vote One For Love
programme.desc: Candace is unexpectedly tasked with helping her former high school rival win a mayoral race.

programme.title: Falling for the Manny
programme.desc: Alice is up for partner at her firm and hires her sister's manny, Jacob, to help with her daughter.

programme.title: Love's Playlist
programme.desc: Music exec Amanda clashes with brand rep Sam at a launch party, unaware she already met him online.

programme.title: Come Dance at My Wedding
programme.desc: A woman faces opposition from her estranged father when she plans to sell the family's dance studio.

programme.title: The Battle: Roar to Victory
programme.desc: Over a 4 day period, a fierce battle takes place between Korean independence militias and imperialist Japanese forces in Manchuria, China.

programme.title: Miss Fortune
programme.desc: A con artist and her daughter target a rich family's hidden treasure—but the heist takes unexpected turns.

programme.title: On Your Wedding Day
programme.desc: Woo-Yeon and Seung-Hee pretend to date to avoid troubles from others. Will the relationship develop?

programme.title: Recalled
programme.desc: Soo-jin, a woman suffering from post-traumatic memory loss, returns to her daily life with her husband after an accident. But her recovery takes an unexpected turn when she starts experiencing eerie visions: One day, she sees a vision of a child living in the same building being hit by a car. Shortly after almost risking her life to save the child, she has yet another chilling vision about a girl living on the 7th floor being harassed by a man, and does what she can to help the girl. She runs into her former boss at an art school, and learns that her husband may not be telling the truth about everything.

programme.title: Revisiting the Heart
programme.desc: A lead homicide detective tries to balance her personal life with the demands and challenges that come with working a tough murder case.

programme.title: Kingsmen
programme.desc: Follows the story of the King family, a known crime syndicate. When their patriarch is killed, they fall under the wrath of a rival crime family, as well as the police. The four eldest brothers will do everything they can to protect their family.

programme.title: Kitty Hallow Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer is on the loose in Houston killing pedophiles and rapists. When Mason and Jessica get into a horrible car accident on their wedding day, Jessica wakes up with no memory of her life or even her husband. As her memories start to come back in pieces, she is afraid that her husband, Mason, could be The Kitty Hallow Killer.

programme.title: Complexx: The Two Exes
programme.desc: Dane is in a constant battle with love and lust. Haunted by both his dead sister and his mother, he fights his torment while being pursued by two ex-girlfriends. When the two women end up moving into his building, they begin a war of manipulation, on top of a masked killer running through the building. Who will make it out alive?

programme.title: The Great Sioux Massacre
programme.desc: The story of Gen. Custer (Philip Carey) and the Little Bighorn is seen through the eyes of two of his subordinates (Joseph Cotten, Darren McGavin).

programme.title: Up the MacGregors
programme.desc: Gregor MacGregor (David Bailey) is celebrating his upcoming marriage to Rosita Carson (Agata Flori) when bandits, led by the evil Maldonado (Leo Anchóriz), steal the family fortune. Determined to get their money back, Gregor and his six brothers go after the robbers. They run across a dentist and his beautiful daughter, who help them find the gang's hideout and retrieve their cash -- but then Maldonado takes Rosita hostage in retaliation. When Gregor comes to save her, he is also captured.

programme.title: 7th Cavalry
programme.desc: Returning to Fort Lincoln, Capt. Benson learns of Custer's defeat at the Little Big Horn. At the inquiry as Custer's officers blame Custer for the defeat, Benson tries to defend him. However, Benson was suspiciously absent at the time of the battle and is now despised by the troops. So when an order to retrieve the bodies from the battlefield arrives, Benson volunteers for the dangerous mission of returning back into Indian territory.

programme.title: Ambush at Tomahawk Gap
programme.desc: Flaming arrows stop four ex-convicts searching a ghost town for their buried loot.

programme.title: Rio Grande
programme.desc: Lt. Col. Yorke leads his cavalry troops to the Rio Grande to fight a warring tribe. Yorke's toughest battle lies ahead when his unorthodox plan to outwit the elusive Apaches leads to possible court-martial.

programme.title: The Dark Command
programme.desc: A Civil War tale based on the exploits of the notorious outlaw William Quantrill. A courageous sheriff stands up to Quantrill and his band of guerrillas pillaging the countryside in Civil War-torn Kansas, and stops the raids.

programme.title: Dakota
programme.desc: In 1871 Dakota, two crooked businessmen oppose the local wheat farmers and the railroad development, in order to control the town of Fargo.

programme.title: Red River
programme.desc: John Wayne, Montgomery Clift and Walter Brennan give stellar performances in Howard Hawks' epic masterpiece as a self-made cattle baron (Wayne) and his adopted son (Clift) risk everything to drive their herd across the treacherous Chisholm Trail.

programme.title: Against a Crooked Sky
programme.desc: When the eldest daughter of a family of settlers is captured by an American Indian warrior, her brother, Sam Sutter (Stewart Petersen), sets out to rescue her. Along the way, he encounters a wise, but alcoholic trapper named Russian (Richard Boone) who agrees to help him. The pair's journey into the remote Red Rock region of Utah is a perilous one, which ultimately brings them face to face with Chief Cut Tongue (Henry Wilcoxon), whose solution to the situation is a treacherous one.

programme.title: Crazy Westerners
programme.desc: Hoping to rid the world of evil, a female gunslinger (Rita Pavone) steals gold and plans to destroy it.

programme.title: Bounty Hunter in Trinity
programme.desc: Townsfolk hire a bounty hunter to protect them from a band of Mexican outlaws.

programme.title: Adios, Gringo
programme.desc: Locals want to hang a rancher (Giuliano Gemma) for stealing his own cattle and shooting a bad guy in self-defense.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas allows some snowed-in stagecoach passengers to stay with him until the roads are passable. Trouble brews when the whisky salesman and gunfighter fall for the same woman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas recognizes Dr. Battle as an ex-gunslinger with whom he once fought. He helps with a dying man, but Lucas and the doctor have unresolved anger.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A Chinese man and his son fight prejudice as they try to open a laundry in North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark decide to enter a local turkey shoot to raise money to buy a ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Californians
programme.desc: Matt thinks twice before about arresting Alonzo Hicks.

programme.title: The Californians
programme.desc: Matt probes the death of a prominent citizen.

programme.title: The Californians
programme.desc: Matt uncovers a crime ring while investigating a murder.

programme.title: The Californians
programme.desc: A man promises a girl her weight in gold if she marries him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A group of hill folk is installed as peace officers in a town near North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An elderly recluse with a mean reputation helps Lucas rescue Mark.

programme.title: The Tall Men
programme.desc: Ben (Clark Gable) and Clint (Cameron Mitchell) Allison have been hired to lead a herd of cattle from Texas to Montana. Before long, they see a tribe of Native Americans raiding a small pioneer village. The brothers save the spirited Nella Turner (Jane Russell) and romantic sparks immediately fly between Nella and Ben. However, Nella's desire for wealth puts a damper on their burgeoning relationship. Meanwhile, the cattle drivers must make one last trip through unwelcoming native territories.

programme.title: The King and Four Queens
programme.desc: The four McDade brothers stage a successful heist -- except that three of them are killed. When their wives and mother learn that only one of the young men survived with the loot, they are eager to find out which one. Slick traveler Dan Kehoe (Clark Gable) catches wind of this strange situation and decides to charm the women in hopes of eventually enjoying the spoils. Before long, however, the lonely females begin competing for Dan, disintegrating into a cut-throat battle royal for his heart.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.sub-title: The Battle of San Francisco Bay
programme.desc: A Navy officer faces down a vigilante mob.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.sub-title: The Wild West's Biggest Train Holdup
programme.desc: A deputy tries to bolster his boss and mentor.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A sheriff wants to uphold the law without a gun.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A minister confronts a tough saloonkeeper.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Native prisoners slip away from their captors and return to the warpath, armed with stolen rifles.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: The appointed warden of a Nevada prison tries to apprehend three notorious escaped convicts who've been terrorizing the state.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Two thieves murder a Native man for the gold he had mined, but his widow plans her revenge against the killers.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: An Army officer helps a young man track down his sister who was captured by Indians years before when the rest of their family was killed in a raid.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: The theft of turkeys being brought to market sets up a showdown between lawlessness and justice.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A mail delivery rider attempts to help a widow find the right man to marry and to help tend her farm and rear her young son.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A Quaker farmer undertakes a journey out west with his most precious possessions, apple-tree seedlings.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Susan Magoffin, accompanying her husband going west, becomes the first woman to travel the Santa Fe Trail.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A crew of mine developers ingeniously races against time to make it from Arizona to San Diego for an important meeting with bankers.

programme.title: Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: Two former Texas Rangers renew their spirit of adventure as they and other residents of a Texas town join a cattle drive to the Montana Territory.

programme.title: Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: Call (Tommy Lee Jones) and Gus (Robert Duvall) are forced into a confrontation with an old enemy who kidnaps and brutalizes Lorena.

programme.title: Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: Jake's (Robert Urich) involvement with the Suggs gang reaches a tragic climax Gus reunites with an old flame (Anjelica Houston).

programme.title: Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: Gus (Robert Duvall) is injured during an Indian attack Call (Tommy Lee Jones) has a final run-in with Blue Duck.

programme.title: The Warrant
programme.desc: Two friends from the Union Army find themselves on opposite sides of the law after the war.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas uses a bullet as evidence to convict a crooked gambler.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident that leaves his legs paralyzed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A stranger arrives on the McCain ranch claiming to be a friend of Lucas'.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas refuses help to an old man running from a gang of criminals.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier: John Mullan: Roadbuilder of the West
programme.desc: Young Army officer John Mullan heads west to help establish an important wagon route through the Northern Rockies, but before he can build his road, he must survive the hardships of the frontier and a dangerous encounter with Yakima warriors.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: The true tale of Pearl Hart, the notorious "Bandit Queen" with no money to care for her gravely ill mother, Pearl makes a fateful decision to enter a life of crime and soon becomes the first woman to rob a stagecoach in the Old West.

programme.desc: The Dalton Gang attempts to pull off the most brazen bank robbery of the Old West when they hatch a plan to rob two banks at the same time when their plan explodes in a hail of gunfire, only one Dalton is left alive to tell the tale.

programme.title: Cheyenne: Trouble Street
programme.desc: Cheyenne gets jailed in Colton City where the marshal jails innocent men for chain gang manpower.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: Aging rancher George Washington McLintock (John Wayne), a wealthy self-made man, is forced to deal with numerous personal and professional problems. Seemingly everyone wants a piece of his enormous farmstead, including high-ranking government men, McLintock's own sons and nearby Native Americans. As McLintock tries to juggle his various adversaries, his wife, who left him two years previously, suddenly returns. But she isn't interested in her husband -- she wants custody of their daughter.

programme.title: Maximum Foodie
programme.desc: Big money, big city vibes Hong Kong houses the world's highest number of millionaires and it's something that's not lost on you as you venture to Asia's world city. In this episode, Sashi is on a quest to understand how Michelin rates and assesses the sheer depth of eateries in this metropolis. He will meet the top chefs of the city and understand their psyche, their trials and tribulations as they climbed their way to the top of the restaurant industry with 3 Michelin stars. But it's not all high brow cuisine, Sashi will also dive deep into the old school neighborhoods, sampling the local fare and seek out how Michelin is rating Asia's sheer depth of eateries

programme.title: Maximum Foodie
programme.desc: Big money, big city vibes Hong Kong houses the world's highest number of millionaires and it's something that's not lost on you as you venture to Asia's world city. In this episode, Sashi is on a quest to understand how Michelin rates and assesses the sheer depth of eateries in this metropolis. But it's not all high brow cuisine, Sashi will also dive deep into the old school neighborhoods, sampling the local fare and seek out how Michelin is rating Asia's sheer depth of eateries.

programme.title: Maximum Foodie
programme.sub-title: Philippines - More fun in the Philippines part 1
programme.desc: The story of cacao is more akin to South America, but in this episode, Sashi tracks the story of cacao in the Philippines, the entry point of cacao in Asia. With his friend, Spanish chef, Chele Gonzalez, they embark on an anthropological exploration tracing how the ancestral varietal cacao (crillio) came to be in the Philippine islands. Visiting farms to mystical islands, to top kitchens in Manila, this is the ‘never-before-told' tale of cacao in the Philippine islands.

programme.title: Maximum Foodie
programme.sub-title: Philippines - More fun in the Philippines part 2
programme.desc: The story of cacao is more akin to South America, but in this episode, Sashi tracks the story of cacao in the Philippines, the entry point of cacao in Asia. With his friend, Spanish chef, Chele Gonzalez, they embark on an anthropological exploration tracing how the ancestral varietal cacao (crillio) came to be in the Philippine islands. Visiting farms to mystical islands, to top kitchens in Manila, this is the ‘never-before-told' tale of cacao in the Philippine islands.

programme.title: Maximum Foodie
programme.desc: Vietnam offers travelers a wide range of exotic as well as simple homegrown grub. Sashi rolls into town with no knowledge of Vietnamese cuisine, and he gets an indepth street food 101 tour of the city. From learning about haute Franco-Vietnamese cuisine with the city's best French chefs, to a simple and honest bowl of pho. In this episode, Sashi uncovers the bustling city of Hanoi and all its trappings. Secret alleyways leading to decades old cafes offering famous brews like egg coffee to iconic places that serve French style baguettes and everything in between!

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: If you're cutting back on meat you may wonder what to eat more of. Ellie shows you how easy (and tasty) it is to incorporate other protein-rich elements into your snacks and meals. Recipes include Broccoli and Cheddar Soup, Steak Fajitas, Asian Noodle Bowl with Peanut Dressing, and 3 Ingredient Crunchy Roasted Chickpeas.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Ellie helps you get the bold taste you crave from your favorite foods while keeping salt in check in your kitchen. Recipes include 3-ingredient Coriander Crusted Turkey Breast, Sweet & Spicy Roasted Root Vegetable, Tri-Color Salad Pizza, and Family Favorite Minestrone Soup.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Raw foods are on hot now. But cooked foods have unique benefits too. Let Ellie suss out the facts from the hype for you. Recipes include Gazpacho, 3 Ingredient Tomato Sauce, Zucchini Carpaccio, and Wok Charred Lettuce with Shrimp.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Ellie hits refresh on the typical brunch menu with some creative, make-ahead crowd-pleasers that break the mold. Recipes include Eggs Florentine in Tomato Cups, Breakfast Strata, Pumpkin Waffles, and 3 Ingredient Brussel Sprout Hash with Egg.

programme.title: Ellie's Real Good Food
programme.desc: Americans get more than 25% of calories from snacks. Ellie shows how to make them count with some great ways to satisfy the cravings we get around the clock. Recipes include 3-ingredient Chocolate Grape Banana Skewers, Nutty Oatmeal Bars, Spring Cottage Peas with Basil, and Hummus with Cumin-Roasted Carrots.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Barbecue Health Food: A little-known fact-Steven Raichlen's first James Beard Award-winning book wasn't about barbecue, but a book on healthy eating. This show harnesses the flavor- boosting, fat-melting power of live fire to produce grilled fare that not only tastes good but is good for you. From the paellas of Spain to the grilled beef salads of Southeast Asia.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Steak. Few other words in the English language have such power to make our hearts beat faster and our mouths water than sizzling slabs of beef seared over live fire. In this show we embark on some meaty globe hopping, exploring over-the-top steaks from France, Cambodia, and the American Southwest. Hot fire. Sizzling meat. It's a carnivore's dream come true.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Let Texans brag about brisket and Carolinians praise pulled pork shoulder. For the rest of us, the ultimate symbol of barbecue is ribs. In the American Midwest, ribs mean baby backs or other pork ribs, while in Korea, the bone of choice is the beef short rib. In the eastern Mediterranean, lamb ribs reign supreme. In this show we give you three of the best ribs ever.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Killer Barbecue – Hold the Meat You don't need a degree in barbecue to know that vegetables have hit the grill big time. Veggies for hardcore carnivores who crave killer accompaniments to their meats, for health-conscious grillers, and for everyone who delights in the smokiness and supernatural sweetness live fire imparts to plant and dairy foods.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Charm City ‘Que: Baltimore, the town where I grew up, boasts plenty of awesome foods for grilling. Pit beef was born here. In the seafood department you find a sweet white-fleshed fish the rest of the world calls striped bass and Baltimoreans know as rockfish. And no Charm City meal would be complete without chocolate top cookies.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Barbecue on a Budget: A lot of American barbecue began with inexpensive meat cuts, like spareribs, beef shoulder, and pork belly. With the economic insecurities brought on by COVID- 9, we're all feeling the pinch, and budget grilling has taken on new urgency. Besides, why should Kobe beef and tomahawk steaks get all the love? This is barbecue on a budget.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Sustainable Seafood: Pollution. Overfishing. Abusive labor practices. There's a lot of negative news coming out about the seafood industry lately, and much of it breaks your heart. Today's show celebrates seafood we can eat because it's fished in a way that's humane and environmentally sound. Activists call it sustainable seafood. I call it three great reasons for firing up your grill.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Social Distance Tailgating: From its humble origins on the back of a buckboard wagon to today's high-octane outdoor foodie extravaganzas, tailgating continues to enthrall—make that obsess—American sports fans. This episode is our our annual celebration of tailgating with a global twist. The socializing may be distant this year—all the more reason to up your game at the grill.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians, former showgirl Rachel Phelps (Margaret Whitton), has a sweetheart deal to move the team to Miami. But to break the lease with the city of Cleveland, ticket sales have to plummet. So Phelps hires the most incompetent players available, including near-blind pitcher Rick Vaughn (Charlie Sheen) and injury-prone catcher Jake Taylor (Tom Berenger). But her villainous tactics accidentally foster a can-do team spirit, turning the Indians into potential winners.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Ignacio (Jack Black), or Nacho to his friends, works as a cook in the Mexican monastery where he grew up. The monastery is home to a host of orphans whom Nacho cares for deeply, but there is not much money to feed them properly. Nacho decides to raise money for the children by moonlighting as a Lucha Libre wrestler with his partner Esqueleto (Héctor Jiménez), but since the church forbids Lucha, Nacho must disguise his identity.

programme.title: The Longest Yard
programme.desc: Disgraced pro football quarterback Paul Crewe (Adam Sandler) lands in jail, where manipulative Warden Hazen (James Cromwell) recruits him to advise the institution's team. This turns into a lead role quarterbacking a crew of inmates in a game against a team of prison guards. Aided by incarcerated ex-NFL coach Nate Scarborough (Burt Reynolds), Crewe and his team must overcome not only the bloodthirstiness of the opposition, but also the corrupt officials trying to fix the game against them.

programme.title: Bad News Bears
programme.desc: Morris Buttermaker (Billy Bob Thornton) is a burned-out minor league baseball player who loves to drink and can't keep his hands to himself. His long-suffering lawyer (Marcia Gay Harden) arranges for him to manage a local Little League team, and Buttermaker soon finds himself the head of a rag-tag group of misfit players. Through unconventional team-building exercises and his offbeat coaching style, Buttermaker helps his hapless Bears prepare to meet their rivals, the Yankees.

programme.title: David Harris: Recalculating

Harris has entertained North American audiences for over 20 years with over 2000 live performances to date. He regularly appears at clubs, colleges, corporate events, theaters, arts centers, alternative rooms and other top venues across the U.S. and Canada.

programme.title: Kristin Key
programme.desc: Kristin Key grew up a minister's daughter in a small town in West Texas. Much like Footloose, she was raised in a no-drinking, no-dancing, no instrumental music environment. She seemed like any other well-behaved girl… until she opened her mouth. It was obvious from the beginning that she had a quick wit and undeniable sense of humor.

programme.title: Greg Morton
programme.sub-title: I Started Out, as a Baby
programme.desc: Greg Morton had only two choices in schoolyard conflicts. Learn the ways of the force, or use his wit to diffuse situations. That wit would soon lead to winning first prize in the, ‘So You Think You're Funny Contest' and the beginning of his stand-up comedy career. He was no longer the shy introverted kid, drawing cartoons in the corner. He had finally found his voice. A voice he would later use to direct and voice over twenty Saturday Morning cartoons. This former mobile disc jockey, who used to play songs at weddings, now sings song parodies on nationally syndicated radio shows, like the Bob and Tom Show. Take his Obama Man, sung to the tune of Candy Man, which has racked up over 4 million hits on YouTube.

programme.title: Almost Adults

Both struggle to keep their friendship together as they begin growing apart.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: Molori Safari, Madikwe Game Reserve, North West Province
programme.desc: Returning to the magnificent Madikwe Game Reserve for her sixth Safari destination, Sika visits MOLORI SAFARI, a boutique Safari Lodge overlooking the Dwarsberg Mountains and the Madikwe Valley. The Lodge is recognised as one of Southern Africa's most Private and Luxurious Safari Lodges and they are proudly actively engaged in ongoing Conservation efforts. A very unique and special feature is the Whiskey and Gin Bar at the secret Hideout where you can enjoy the magnificence of Wildlife only a few feet away from you around the Lodge's waterhole.

programme.title: Dawn to Dusk

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: Saseka Tented Camp, Thornybush Nature Reserve, Greater Kruger
programme.desc: Sika's seventh Safari destination is situated in the Greater Kruger area. Thornybush was one of the first Private Nature Reserves in South Africa. Set in the North-eastern portion of this Wilderness Paradise, Saseka Tented Camp is positioned on a distinct curve in the Monwana dry riverbed, which gently sweeps through this incredible landscape. A remarkable setting in the Wild that inspired visionary Designers & Architects, Silvio Rech and Lesley Carstens, to create a Safari Lodge that has a strikingly unique layout and finds a superb balance between cutting-edge design, Classical style and truly feeling connected to the outside environment.

programme.title: Laugh & Learn
programme.desc: Laugh & Learn is a charming educational show designed for preschoolers, where entertainment meets learning. Featuring adorable characters, the show introduces children to fundamental concepts such as numbers, letters, shapes, and colors through interactive play, memorable songs, and engaging storylines. Each episode encourages curiosity and cognitive development while ensuring children have a joyful and laughter-filled experience. With its vibrant animation and child-friendly approach, Laugh & Learn by Mattel is a trusted companion for parents and a beloved favorite among young viewers

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Einstein: Let's Learn about Dogs, Cats and More
programme.desc: Meet Cats, Dogs, Birds, Bugs and Woodland Creatures! Learn simple words through narration and repetition. Meet all sorts of creatures from domestic kittens to jungle cats, puppies, big and small birds, butterflies, lady bugs, otters and deer!! See whimsical toys and puppets.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Einstein: Let's Learn Signs: Family and Home
programme.desc: Discover sign language along with your favorite Baby Einstein Characters! Learn how to sign the names of common things from different objects found at home and outside, family, and even your very own neighborhood through repetition and narration. Real-life images of toys and objects along with gentle melodies engage viewers as they learn a variety of different signs.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Within a baby's first year of life, new experiences can transform what might otherwise seem to be ordinary events into exciting opportunities for imaginative play. Baby Neptune exposes little ones to the wonders of water in their world -- whether they're stomping in the rain, splashing in the bathtub, playing "catch me if you can" with the tide on the beach, or "meeting" the fascinating creatures that live in rivers, lakes and oceans.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies continue to explore the world around them, they soon encounter many creatures, both large and small, that are extremely intriguing. Whether furry or feathered, winged or wiggly, bumpy or smooth, each holds a special fascination. Neighborhood Animals exposes little ones to animals most likely to be found close to home or in easily recognized environments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: My First Signs: See and Sign With Baby
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Da Vinci: From Head to Toe
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Hop aboard to see vehicles that travel by land, water and sky! See real-life images of cars, boats and planes in this on-the-go adventure that features cameos from some of your favorite Baby Einstein characters, all while listening to music from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Sounds: Discoveries for Little Ears
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: The Berry Best Treasure
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is being driven to distraction! She can't finish a song that she promised to write for a singing group, thanks to the earsplitting noise from Berrykin construction crews who are trying to find the sparkleberry juice blockage that has shut down the town's power. Strawberry can't cook in the café, Lemon's hair salon appliances are running out of control—life in Berry Bitty City is impossible! Strawberry rallies their spirits by suggesting a fun way for them to spend the day out of town: a treasure hunt! She describes a game where the girls divide into two teams, and each team creates fun written clues for the other that lead to funny objects the girls must collect.

programme.title: The Berry Scary Fun Adventure
programme.desc: With the power completely out in Berry Bitty City, the girls go on a camping trip to be out of the way of the Berrykin work crews. Lemon is nervous because she believes there is a creepy creature in the forest (that she read about in a book Blueberry loaned her), and the girls get the nervous bug, but Strawberry turns their apprehension into fun by daring her friends to stay out in the woods the longest! Rallied by a sense of competition and adventure, the girls divide into three groups and set up tents—each convinced they will be the bravest group. They each come up with diverting activities to distract themselves.

programme.desc: Aoi is left in a coma after he duel with Yusaku. A grieving Akira lures Playmaker into a trap to get the program to heal her. That's when Revolver, Hanoi's leader appears, and challenges Yusaku to a duel with Aoi's fate on the line.

programme.title: Blippi Visits an Orange Farm
programme.desc: Join Blippi as he visits Showcase of Citrus Orange Farm in Clermont, Florida.

programme.title: The Berry Lucky Day
programme.desc: The girls are driven to distraction by their frisky puppies frolicking all over Berry Bitty City! Full of energy and thinking that everything in town is a toy for them to play with, they cause comical mayhem wherever they go. Strawberry suggests the pups need a place of their own where they can play—a dog park! The girls decide to call in Huckleberry, who runs an animal hotel in Berry Big City, to help design the park. With Huck on his way, Cherry practices her singing. She believes her ability to hit a perfect high note is the result of a good luck charm—a beautiful crystal — that she keeps in her pocket. Although Strawberry says singing isn't about luck, but about practice and hard work, Cherry isn't convinced.

programme.title: All Dogs Allowed
programme.desc: The girls plan a formal afternoon lawn party tea to inaugurate their new dog park. Plum is in charge of decorations, Cherry music, and Strawberry snacks. There's even a giant, dog-shaped ice sculpture. As the girls get dressed, Raspberry puts the finishing touches on the high-fashion hats that will accompany their beautiful gowns. At last everything is ready. But when the gate opens... the puppies back away! For some strange reason, they want nothing to do with the dog park! No matter how the girls call them to come in, the pups hesitate and back away, with worried whines. Cherry tries to tempt them by hiding doggie treats around the park, but the pups just run in, snatch the treats and run out. Debate begins about why the pups won't enter the park. Everyone has their own theory. Strawberry wonders if something is scaring them. Blueberry concludes it's Lemon's ice sculpture.

The residents of Dreamville always leave the shop thanking Jenny, but actually, they set the stage for their own miracles, leaving behind in the shop whatever is keeping them from living life and making decisions. After all, the ability to change yourself is the truest form of magic. Jenny and Blam never refuse to help anyone, but it often happens that they're the ones who need help, since Jenny's still a kid and Blam's an eccentric teddy bear.

programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

Because they help people and other cars: fire truck can put out fire, ambulance helps people, when they are hurt or sick, it could drive them to the hospital. Police car patrols the city. Tow truck help other cars, when they are broken down. Watch new car cartoon and learn about helper cars!

programme.title: Sid the Science Kid
programme.desc: A youngster named Sid, who aspires to a career in stand-up comedy, pitches a morning monologue to his stuffed animals that hinges on a burning question (such as "Why do bananas get brown spots?"), then spends the rest of the day searching for the answer in this hybrid combination of animation and puppetry from The Jim Henson Co., in its first PBS project since "Sesame Street."

programme.title: Sid the Science Kid

programme.title: Franklin and Friends
programme.desc: "Franklin and Friends," based on the children's book series featuring Franklin, is a computer-animated series geared toward preschoolers that aims to teach the kids lessons. The series follows Franklin the turtle, now older than in the books and previous TV series, as he experiences adventures and achieves milestones in the community of Woodland, learning lessons along the way. Franklin's friends referenced in the title include best friend Bear, problem-solving Snail, practical joker Rabbit, natural leader Beaver, inventive Fox and empathetic Goose. The series tackles issues that include personal empowerment, socialization, self-esteem, appreciation of nature and school issues.

programme.title: Franklin
programme.desc: Six-year-old Franklin the turtle, his best friend Bear, and their pals face life's challenges together in this animated series based on the books by Paulette Bourgeois and Brenda Clark. Franklin and his friends learn about life in their village of Woodland, frequently with the help of a parent or other adult.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off!The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN!Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.desc: ¿Podría un escondite de riquezas fantásticas haber sido enterrado hace siglos en una pequeña isla en el Atlántico Norte? Y si tal tesoro existe, quién lo enterró. Durante más de 200 años, los buscadores de tesoros han venido a Oak Island.

programme.title: The UnXplained

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Bosques mortales. Casas embrujadas. Montañas de las que algunas personas no salen vivas. ¿Existen los "lugares malvados", en los que parece que suceden cosas malas una y otra vez de manera inexplicable?

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: ¿Cómo se sobrevive lo imposible? Ya sean accidentes de aviones, temperaturas heladas o acciones sobrehumanas al enfrentarse al peligro, los relatos de la supervivencia humana nos obligan a reconsiderar lo que sabemos acerca de nuestra voluntad de vivir.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Quizá el más grande misterio sea lo que nos sucede después de la muerte la respuesta podría hallarse en experiencias cercanas a la muerte, la reencarnación o la posibilidad de que las memorias se transmitan de donadores a recipientes de órganos.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Elio paga su deuda con el Indio y recibe una propuesta inesperada. Sara se enfrenta a Lalo y Shayo, logra viajar y Salvador se somete al trasplante, ahora ella debe pagar su deuda.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Sara recibe dos regalos, luego ella y Elio se entregan al amor. Miriam está preocupada por su hijo y aconseja a su amiga sobre el manejo de contrabando. Patricia escucha los planes de su papá.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Sara realiza su primer trabajo, pero queda en evidencia y la someten con violencia. Vanessa miente descaradamente para vengarse de Elio. Arnulfo y Empanada engañan a Pepito para manipularlo.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Rescatan a Sara, su lealtad fue puesta a prueba y Quintanilla está satisfecho. El padre de Vanessa le revela a Elio un terrible secreto. Juan se siente acorralado, le pide ayuda a Enriqueta.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Sara se confiesa con Eliodoro y le pide algo a Quintanilla a cambio de aceptar su oferta. Ante los hechos, prefiere tomar el camino de la venganza. Juan confronta a Empanada por su traición.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Siguiendo órdenes, Juan planta un explosivo, pero no logra su objetivo. Vanessa confronta a Elio a punta de pistola. Empanada contrata a alguien para que asesine a Enriqueta en prisión.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: La aliada de Enriqueta en prisión se vuelve en su contra y cumple con el encargo. Quintanilla le envía un mensaje al Indio Amaro en nombre de Sara. Elio descubre quién plantó la bomba.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Eliodoro obtiene de Juan toda la verdad y logra vengarse. El Indio Amaro entierra a Tiburón, su único hijo, y le envía un mensaje a Sara. Quintanilla la protege. Aracely presenta a Plutarco.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: El Indio Amaro confirma que el destino ya vengó la muerte de su hijo y sus hombres atacan a Elio en la prisión. Aracely es víctima del chantaje de su expareja. Pepito intenta escapar.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Cambiando de placer Asilo para el pandillero
programme.desc: Patricia y Camilo hicieron terapia con otra pareja para fortalecer la relación, pero Camilo tuvo sexo con la mujer. Andrés salió libre y le pide a Jonathan que le dé el dinero que le dejó a su madre.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: El niño de Jorge y Paula hace fotomontajes y los monetiza en internet su padre, horrorizado, exige la custodia de su hija. Jonathan sufre de podofilia, lo que le trae problemas a su prometida.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: El tatuaje de mi abuela Síndrome de Noé
programme.desc: En el funeral de su abuela, Brian cobró para que le hicieran fotos a un tatuaje que ella tiene en el abdomen. Juliette recoge los animales que encuentra a su paso, pero su esposo no tolera la situación.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: XXX con un monstruo Sorpresa inesperada
programme.desc: Viviana es una actriz porno que se negó a tener sexo con otro actor porque a él le faltan las dos manos. Blanca exige la custodia total del hijo de Michelle, quien acaba de salir de la cárcel.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Carolina descubrió que la graban en la intimidad con la cámara del bebé. Paola quiere regresar a Venezuela con su hija, pero el padre cree que la niña debe ser revisada por médicos en EE. UU.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Mi papá es un condón Hombre en coma, mujer gozando
programme.desc: Clara está a cargo de su nieto y exige que el padre le pague la manutención retroactiva. Por otro lado, Yoel cayó en coma por tomarse unas pastillas para satisfacer sexualmente a su esposa.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Juan descubre cómo elevar su vitalidad sexual y se obsesiona con ello. Alejandro y su hermana reciben una herencia, pero él gasta la totalidad en un proyecto musical que puede ser el último.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Lupita hace predicciones acertadas sobre Fulano consultando su perfil de Facebook. El hermano de Jorge se ahoga tras emborracharse y Jorge culpa al dueño del bar.

programme.title: Minuto para ganar
programme.desc: Diez desafíos, un gran premio y sólo una hora para poder obtenerlo son los ingredientes de este divertido concurso conducido por Marco Antonio Regil. Cada noche los concursantes deberán completar disparatados retos en menos de 60 segundos para evitar ser eliminados. Los elementos de uso cotidiano del hogar se convierten en divertidos juegos en donde las alfombras de baño sirven como trineos, los lápices se vuelven complicados aparatos de ingeniería y las latas de refresco son obstáculos de equilibrio. Al final, tendrán que completar el reto de "La moneda millonaria y en menos de 60 segundos deben hacer que una moneda aterrice dentro de un jarro de agua localizado a 4 metros de distancia. Un ingenioso programa de concursos que mantendrá a los televidentes al filo de sus sillas.

programme.title: Conociendo a los Marsupiales
programme.desc: Los marsupiales son extrañas criaturas que llevan a sus crías en su marsupio. Saltan, trepan y vuelan, son animales fascinantes.

programme.title: Las Vidas Secretas de los Leopardos de las Nieves
programme.desc: A veces se le llama "el fantasma gris" o "el fantasma de las montañas". Su rareza y elusividad son legendarias.

programme.title: Las Vidas Secretas de los Leopardos de las Nieves
programme.desc: A veces se le llama "el fantasma gris" o "el fantasma de las montañas". Su rareza y elusividad son legendarias.

programme.title: Las Vidas Secretas de los Pumas
programme.desc: Los pumas también son llamados leones americanos o leones de montaña y solo están relacionados de manera lejana con los leones.

programme.title: Las Vidas Secretas de los Leones
programme.desc: Los leones, únicos por su sociabilidad, forman manadas de hasta 35. En Masai Mara, Kenia, quedan <15,000, una caída del 75% en 50 años.

programme.title: Las Vidas Secretas de los Leopardos
programme.desc: El leopardo, como la mayoría de grandes los felinos, es un maestro del sigilo. Es difícil verlo ya que necesita ser invisible para cazar.

programme.title: Las Vidas Secretas de los Jaguares
programme.desc: Los primeros científicos apenas podían acercarse a los jaguares, pero ahora, ver un jaguar salvaje es más que un sueño, ¡es una posibilidad!

programme.title: Las Vidas Secretas de los Guepardos
programme.desc: Los guepardos se distinguen de otros felinos en varias formas. Son cazadores diurnos con vista para paisajes abiertos y presas distantes.

programme.title: Oceanos y Ríos
programme.desc: Riaan se une a Wanita, editora de Woman's Health, para bucear con focas en la bahía de Hout, nadando con los “perros del mar”.

programme.title: La Pesca del Día
programme.desc: Riaan se une a Reuben, un chef de Ciudad del Cabo, para pescar en alta mar en Cape Point, enfrentando focas y enormes olas.

programme.title: Bienvenidos al Paraíso
programme.desc: Riaan explora las montañas de Mahe en Seychelles y se reúne con el único seychelense que vive en la isla cuya pasión es la laguna de Alphonse.

programme.title: El Taj Mahal y la Era de Oro del Islam
programme.desc: Los palacios son el legado de los ingenieros islámicos, que culmina en el edificio probablemente más hermoso del mundo: el Taj Mahal.

programme.title: Los Buques más Grandiosos de la Historia
programme.desc: En la Edad de Bronce, los humanos construyeron buques capaces de cruzar océanos y llevar mercaderías de un continente a otro.

programme.title: Ondas gravitacionales
programme.desc: La genética ha avanzado a la edición de genes, una técnica que promete descubrir la cura de enfermedades genéticas como el cáncer.

programme.title: Miami bajo el agua
programme.desc: La NASA podría estar más cerca de responder la gran pregunta: ¿estamos solos? El Telescopio Spitzer hizo un descubrimiento revolucionario.

programme.title: Exoplanetas
programme.desc: Productivo hasta el último día, Cassini reescribió la historia no solo de Saturno y sus lunas, sino de todo el sistema solar.

programme.title: Cassini: La gran final
programme.desc: Descubre un fósil de dinosaurio, lleno de patrones y colores, que que vivió a fines del período Jurásico y durante el período Cretáceo.

programme.title: El mejor fósil de dinosaurio del mundo
programme.desc: El último descubrimiento de una nueva rama de la astronomía nos podría dar un asiento en primera fila en el Big Bang.

programme.title: Homo naledi
programme.desc: Evidencias que sugieren que las personas llegaron a Norteamérica antes de lo que se creía, viajando por caminos ahora cubiertos por el mar.

programme.title: Primeros estadounidenses
programme.desc: Un equipo de investigadores del Reino Unido, al parecer, descurbrió una forma de revertir la terrible enfermedad del Alzheimer.

programme.title: Revertir el Alzheimer
programme.desc: El aterrizador InSight está en una misión en el Planeta Rojo, con la esperanza de descubrir algunos secretos de nuestro planeta vecino.

programme.title: El regreso de los lobos
programme.desc: Un equipo de profesionales de la ciencia capturó una fotografía de un agujero negro que ayudará a develar los grandes misterios del cosmos.

programme.title: Un mundo sin agua

programme.title: Los papiros de Hercolano: descubriendo la historia
programme.desc: La erupción del monte Vesubio diezmó Pompeya y Herculano también se perdió. Hoy, la ciencia descifra digitalmente sus papiros.

programme.title: En busca de vida en Marte: la sonda Perseverance
programme.desc: Conoce a Perseverance, la última sonda de la NASA, mientras se dirige hacia Marte para responder si existió vida en el planeta rojo.

programme.title: El vuelo del Dragón (Actualización de la misión)
programme.desc: Regreso histórico: astronautas de la NASA vuelven a la Tierra en el Dragon Crew de SpaceX. Primer lanzamiento tripulado en 10 años.

programme.title: En busca del planeta perdido
programme.desc: ¿Es posible que haya un planeta oculto? Nueva evidencia sugiere que el legendario Planeta X, o Planeta 9, puede existir... pero ¿dónde?

programme.sub-title: El talento gana partidos, pero el trabajo en equipo y la inteligencia gana campeonatos
programme.desc: Un equipo de fútbol de una preparatoria estadounidense se prepara jugar su partido final y así poder tener la oportunidad de ganar una beca. La vida de los chicos y del entrenador da un giro justo antes del partido.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El que limpio juega, limpio se queda
programme.desc: La madre de un joven soborna al entrenador de su hijo para que no pierda su beca. El joven comienza a imitar las acciones de su madre y soborna a su maestro para obtener ganancias. Una maestra tratará de recuperar los valores dentro de la escuela.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Con su propio corazón, cada quien juzga al ajeno
programme.desc: Jimena es una joven que tiene todo el mundo a sus pies. Sin embargo, tiene capacidades diferentes y por eso es rechazada por las personas del trabajo.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: La competencia entra en su recta final y cada prueba será decisiva para los escuadrones. Yuri se une como juez invitada. Los capitanes comparten una parte de su vida con el público. Verónica Castro recibe una sorpresa de parte de su nieta.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: A un paso de la final
programme.desc: Los pequeños reciben como invitada especial a Lucero. Albertano pone a prueba la honestidad de los capitanes. Las parejas tendrán que demostrar sus habilidades en una prueba de baile improvisado.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los pequeños llegan a la semifinal y uno de los tres escuadrones sentenciados será eliminado. Prince Royce canta a lado de los pequeños sus mejores éxitos. Los capitanes pasan un día especial junto con los jueces.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Después de diez semanas donde los momentos de diversión, alegría y emoción se hicieron presentes, los pequeños viven el último programa de la competencia con un gran performance al lado de grandes artistas como Paulina Rubio.

programme.desc: La violencia se ha apoderado de las vidas de miles de mujeres que han sido asesinadas brutalmente por sus propias parejas, por lo que los movimientos contra feminicidios han incrementado considerablemente.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

Dynamic formations and expressive gestures bring out each member's unique character.

programme.title: NCT DREAM 'BTTF' MV
programme.desc: The bold chant “We are the future” captures NCT DREAM's fearless ambition, while the track's signature synth bass and dynamic hip-hop sound — seamlessly traversing past and future — heighten its cinematic sci-fi atmosphere.NCT DREAM embarks on a journey to find their brightest, most confident selves in the title track ‘BTTF (Back To The Future).' Riding a time machine sparks reflection on a meaningful past with no regrets and ignites a renewed drive toward the future.
